name: Task Preprocessing
description: Uses Haiku to analyze a task description before execution, enriching it with intent classification, enhanced prompts, and flags such as feature mode, auto-decompose, and spawn-team. Applies the result back to the task before launch.

Managers/TaskPreprocessor.cs.content:
class PreprocessResult
  Header: string
  EnhancedPrompt: string
  ApplyFix: bool
  ExtendedPlanning: bool
  IsFeatureMode: bool
  AutoDecompose: bool
  SpawnTeam: bool
  UseMcp: bool
  Iterations: int
class TaskPreprocessor
  ApplyToTask(AgentTask task, PreprocessResult result) -> void
  FormatActiveToggles(AgentTask task) -> string

patterns: Fire-and-await Haiku call before main task launch
dependencies: Claude Haiku via CLI or API
